beats.narration: After the amplifier and detector, one stage decides what reaches the display: the filters. And they read in hertz, not your dial's kilohertz.

payload.title: THE LAST GATE
payload.sub: Filters shape probe motion, not test frequency.

beats.narration: Here is why. Demodulation strips the carrier, leaving slow voltages whose frequency comes from probe motion. Filters shape that motion signal, never the eddy currents.
A flaw gets its frequency from the scan. Drift crawls below it, noise screams above. Bracket the flaw with a band-pass window and both neighbors die.

payload.heading: Build a window around the flaw
payload.note: DRIFT < HP CORNER · FLAW BAND · LP CORNER < NOISE

beats.narration: But the window moves with your wrist. Double the scan speed, double the band. Slow down to look close, and high-pass eats the signal.

payload.heading: The band rides on scan speed

beats.narration: Push high-pass to its limit and you get differentiation: rate of change only. Superb on sharp flaws, blind to anything slow. So standardize at production speed.

payload.sub: A filter setting is a scan-speed setting.
